newsArray.title: I don’t want to change my personality, I want to be the same person as I was before Shreyas Iyer on Captaincy
newsArray.description: अय्यर ने कहा, मुझे हमेशा चुनौतियां पसंद रही हैं, मुंबई में क्रिकेट का स्तर बहुत ऊंचा है और प्रतिस्पर्धा भी बेहद कड़ी होती है, वहां हर दूसरा बच्चा मुंबई का प्रतिनिधित्व करने का सपना देखता है. The post I don’t want to change my personality, I want to be the same person as I was before Shreyas Iyer on Captaincy appeared first on Cricket Country .
creator: akhilesh tripathi

newsArray.title: Ollie Robinson still needs to regain the trust of England management | Andy Bull
newsArray.description: The man of the match will not be judged on his comeback at Lord’s but on his ability to bowl spells when batters are set By 1pm, the only play left under way at Lord’s was at the wrong side of the stands, where the lads and dads with nothing else to do were batting with umbrellas in front of bins. The Test they had paid to see was done before lunch. In the end the whole match lasted only 996 balls, which made it the shortest game here to include all 40 wickets falling in well over a century. Pakistan’s Hanif Mohammad batted about that many by himself against West Indies in Barbados back in 1958, and you didn’t have to strain to hear the grumbles of one or two older salts around the ground complaining that this latest generation do not know how to build an innings. Emilio Gay was the only man who managed to stitch together as many as two hours batting in the middle, and even he needed a lot of good fortune to do it. Still, the batters had more of a match than the spin bowlers on either side, who didn’t get to bowl a single over between them. Last time this happened in England was a Test against West Indies at Headingley in 1988. Continue reading...
creator: andy bull

newsArray.title: MCC ‘frustrated’ by Lord’s pitch after wicket-filled England-New Zealand Test
newsArray.description: London, June 7 (SocialNews.XYZ) The Marylebone Cricket Club (MCC) has admitted it was "naturally frustrated" by the Lord's pitch used in the opening Test between England and New Zealand after concerns over excessive seam movement... The post MCC ‘frustrated’ by Lord’s pitch after wicket-filled England-New Zealand Test appeared first on Social News XYZ .
